full_text:
Pang Hong (Jushi) 龐宏 (巨師)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Hong (龐宏), styledJushi (巨師). Son of Pang Tong. Joined Wei with Huang Quan after the Shu army’s defeat by Wu. Pang Hong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
